info.name: 14. Use Case - Gizi
info.description:
For **complete repository for all SATUSEHAT use-cases** please access our public workspaces : [Postman Workspaces](https://s.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT) For **detailed SATUSEHAT use-cases import link** please see : [Postman Public Kemkes Link](https://link.kemkes.go.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT) Any information about SATUSEHAT FHIR Profile could be accessed through [Simplifier FHIR Profile](https://simplifier.net/guide/SATUSEHAT-FHIR-R4-Implementation-Guide/Home/FHIRProfiles?version=current) | **Tanggal** | **Riwayat Perubahan** | **Penanggung Jawab** | | --- | --- | --- | | 24 Juni 2024 | Versi Pertama API sesuai dengan Playbook Gizi V3.4 | Thomas Chaidir

Luthfi Nabilah Qonitah

Silvia Alvinia

Sania Fitria | | 15 Nov 2024 | Versi Kedua API sesuai dengan Playbook Gizi V4.0 | Thomas Chaidir

Luthfi Nabilah Qonitah |
